overview.summary: SDU System (SDU_SYSTEM) preserves the SDU system contract, control plane, event bus, agent model, routing chains and execution boundaries declared by the original artifact.

principles.name: Canonical SNS contract
principles.description: SNS is the canonical system contract; Canvas, runtime and scripts consume it.

principles.name: Fail closed execution
principles.rationale: Local execution only unless owner gate explicitly opens a bounded external write.

decisions.title: SDU System
decisions.context: contractSource={"id":"SYSTEM_NERVOUS_INDEX","path":"../../../SYSTEM_NERVOUS_INDEX.json","sourceOfTruth":"SYSTEM_NERVOUS_INDEX"}; authorityModel=SNS is the canonical system contract; Canvas, runtime and scripts consume it.
decisions.decision: Use controlPlane=CEO_CONTROL_PLANE.code-workspace; eventBus=routes[] in SYSTEM_NERVOUS_INDEX.json; agentModel=agents[] in SYSTEM_NERVOUS_INDEX.json; routingChains=routes[] in SYSTEM_NERVOUS_INDEX.json.
decisions.rationale: policy.failClosed=true, liveWrite=false, secretAccess=false; Local execution only unless owner gate explicitly opens a bounded external write.; possibleAction=Use Ask Agent or Focus Mode to interpret the SNS contract before executing any SDU workflow.
